nameEn: Growing of spices, aromatic, drug and pharmaceutical crops
description: This class includes the growing of spices, aromatic, narcotic and pharmaceutical crops.
includes: growing of spices and aromatic crops: pepper (piper spp.); chillies and peppers (capsicum spp.); nutmeg, mace and cardamoms; anise, badian and fennel; cinnamon (canela); cloves; ginger; vanilla; hops; other spices and aromatic crops
growing of drug and narcotic crops
growing of plants used primarily in perfumery, in pharmacy or for insecticidal, fungicidal or similar purposes
